properties.query: select p.payed_at as '결제일', p.price as '결제금액' from payments p left join members m on m.member_id = p.member_id where m.email = ?;
INSERT INTO payments (member_id, payed_at, price) SELECT m.member_id, now(), 29900 FROM members m WHERE m.email = ?;
delete from payments where member_id = (select member_id from members where email = ? );
